senses.gloss: to ring, to produce a gentle modulating sound
to suck, to eat with the tongue (said of certain animals)

examples.text: لَاعِيَة شجرة تنبت في سفح الجبال لها ورق طيّب الرِيح تجرسه النَحْل وله لبن غزير إذا قطِعَت
examples.english: Green spurge or sun spurge is a shrub which grows on the surfaces of mountains, it has good-smelling leaves sucked by bees and copious milk when slit.
